summary: Tested new player experience features: Combat Tab, Class Resources, Rest Endpoints, Level Up Wizard, Custom Items. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: CharacterCombatTab.js properly implements weapon attacks from equipped items with to-hit and damage calculations
Class resources (Ki Points, Rage, etc.) use clickable dot trackers with spend/restore functionality
Features section shows type badges (A=Action, BA=Bonus Action, R=Reaction, P=Passive) with expand-on-click
Short Rest and Long Rest buttons properly call backend endpoints and update character state
Level Up Wizard shows features gained at new level (e.g., 'Action Surge' for Fighter level 2)
Custom item creation form in inventory allows adding weapons/armor/gear with damage/AC values
Equipment auto-saves and equipped weapons appear as attacks in combat tab
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test character TEST_Hero_1773389545537
context_for_next_testing_agent: Player experience features fully implemented and tested. Combat tab shows weapon attacks from equipped items, class resources with dot trackers, features with type badges, and rest buttons. Level Up Wizard shows features gained at new level. Custom item creation works in inventory.

backend_tests_summary.resources_endpoint: 3/3 passed - PUT /api/characters/{id}/resources updates Ki Points, Rage, etc.
backend_tests_summary.short_rest_endpoint: 3/3 passed - POST /api/characters/{id}/short-rest with hit dice spending
backend_tests_summary.long_rest_endpoint: 4/4 passed - POST /api/characters/{id}/long-rest restores HP, resources, spell slots
backend_tests_summary.character_data: 4/4 passed - Character has resources, equipped, ability scores, combat stats fields
backend_tests_summary.inventory_update: 1/1 passed - PATCH equipped items for weapon attacks

frontend_tests_summary.combat_tab: PASSED - data-testid='combat-tab' found, shows Attacks, Resources, Features sections
frontend_tests_summary.weapon_attacks: PASSED - Longsword (+4, 1d8+2 slashing) and Unarmed Strike (+4, 1+2 bludgeoning) displayed
frontend_tests_summary.class_resources: PASSED - Second Wind resource with clickable dot tracker and SHORT rest badge
frontend_tests_summary.features_section: PASSED - Fighting Style (P=Passive) and Second Wind (BA=Bonus Action) with type badges
frontend_tests_summary.rest_buttons: PASSED - Short Rest and Long Rest buttons found with data-testid attributes
frontend_tests_summary.level_up_wizard: PASSED - Shows 'Action Surge' feature gained when leveling Fighter to level 2
frontend_tests_summary.custom_items: PASSED - Custom button opens form with Item name, type selector, Damage/AC field
frontend_tests_summary.equipment_slots: PASSED - Armor, Shield, Main Hand, Off Hand slots all present

features_verified.combat_tab_weapon_attacks: Equipped weapons (Longsword) appear as attacks with calculated to-hit (+4) and damage (1d8+2)
features_verified.combat_tab_class_resources: Second Wind resource shown with clickable dot tracker, SHORT rest badge
features_verified.combat_tab_features: Features list with type badges (P, BA) and expand-on-click descriptions
features_verified.level_up_features_gained: Level Up Wizard shows 'Action Surge' when leveling Fighter 1→2
features_verified.custom_item_creation: Form with Item name, type dropdown (Weapon), Damage field, Add button
features_verified.equipment_auto_save: Equipped Longsword appears in combat tab attacks section
